scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @company-rag/database && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @company-rag/web" "npm run dev --workspace @company-rag/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @company-rag/database && npm run build --workspace @company-rag/web && npm run build --workspace @company-rag/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @company-rag/web && npm run lint --workspace @company-rag/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @company-rag/database && npm run typecheck --workspace @company-rag/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @company-rag/api
